purpose: Evolving hero avatar: same character (user's face) upgrades gear as they level up. tier-0 already exists; generate tiers 1-4.
detailed_source: docs/avatar-tiers-prompts.md has the full identity-lock + per-tier prompts. This file is the short checklist; use that doc for the exact wording.

keep_identical_across_tiers: arms-crossed pose on a low-poly rock
shared.note: After the scene render, also request a transparent-background crop for the avatar component.

items.name: Aprendiz
items.prompt: Same chibi hero and jungle scene as tier-0. TIER 1: first real gear. Add a worn brown leather shoulder pad (pauldron), leather bracers, a bronze buckle on the sash, a sturdier hand-carved wooden staff with a small bronze cap; crystal pendant glowing a little brighter. Aura: faint warm amber glow at the feet only. Keep face, scene, pose and palette identical.

items.name: Adepto
items.prompt: Same chibi hero and jungle scene. TIER 2: light armor + cape. Add a light teal-green leather-and-cloth chest piece over the shirt, a short traveler's cape with an emerald clasp, reinforced bracers, a wooden staff topped with a small glowing blue crystal. Aura: soft teal aura with a few floating rune motes near the staff. Keep face, scene, pose, palette identical.

items.name: Veterano
items.prompt: Same chibi hero and jungle scene. TIER 3: engraved plate armor. Add ornate engraved plate armor in bronze and emerald tones (chest plate + shoulder guards), a flowing patterned cloak, glowing engraved runes along the armor edges, a polished staff with a bright crystal head. Aura: strong teal-and-gold aura, denser fireflies, slightly stronger god-rays. Keep face, scene, pose, palette identical.

items.name: Legendario
items.prompt: Same chibi hero and jungle scene. TIER 4 (final): legendary hero. Full legendary armor with emerald-and-gold filigree and glowing energy seams, a majestic flowing cloak, an ornate staff crowned with a radiant electric-blue crystal, small floating runic shards orbiting the character, subtle halo of light behind the head. Aura: intense electric-blue and teal, peak volumetric god-rays. Epic but tasteful, not cluttered. Keep face, scene, pose identical.
